name: Under Cover Golf
address: 19 W Marshall St, Rice Lake, WI 54868
about: Under Cover Golf is a golf simulator and club repair facility offering a climate-controlled environment for year-round practice and play. The venue features professional-grade simulators and a dedicated club repair shop, catering to both recreational golfers and serious players seeking to refine their skills. With a focus on convenience and quality, it provides a versatile space for individual practice, lessons, and group bookings, complemented by a workshop for custom club fittings and repairs.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade TruGolf and E6 Connect simulators for realistic play on world-class courses
On-site club repair and fitting services for equipment optimization
Flexible booking options for 1-hour or 2-hour simulator sessions and 30-minute or 1-hour lessons
Multiple bays available for groups or solo practice
Climate-controlled indoor facility for all-weather play
Variety of renowned golf courses available for simulation

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB (Bring Your Own Food) policy allows guests to bring their own snacks and meals.
BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) policy allows guests to bring their own alcoholic drinks.

simulator_hardware.notes: High-end simulator system paired with E6 Connect software for course simulation

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, guests are expected to bring their own golf clubs for simulator sessions and lessons. The venue also offers club repair and fitting services.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, Under Cover Golf operates on a BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) and BYOF (Bring Your Own Food) policy, allowing guests to bring their own snacks and alcoholic drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A full 18-hole simulation typically takes approximately 2-3 hours, depending on the course and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Under Cover Golf is family-friendly and suitable for juniors, with offerings including lessons and simulator play for younger golfers.
